title: Target Entity
description: Renders a glowing halo ring, or adds a glow effect on/under entities (drops, players, mobs) to make them more visible.
body:
Renders a glowing halo ring, or adds a glow effect on/under entities (drops, players, mobs) to make them more visible.

Credits to ImproperIssues' ClickCrystals mod for the inspiration and some rendering stuff.

![Drops having ring effect with auto-color mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d58GBGym/images/5a52a41860bd5bd947e0e9941ddc93812c78b056.png)

![A few different mobs having ring effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d58GBGym/images/0e3579583f8ad60f7b6de745462b1a14db93ee8f.png)

![Settings screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d58GBGym/images/33788280176036db4d089891dbac6a05316ac5a0.png)

More screenshots in gallery tab.
